test_framework: No dedicated test files found - validation via TypeScript compiler
build_command: cd apps/web && npx prisma generate && npx tsc --noEmit
verification_instructions: Run `npx prisma generate && npx tsc --noEmit` from apps/web to verify no type errors. Run `npx next lint` for lint check.
setup_instructions: npm install at root, npx prisma generate in apps/web
environment_constraints: No external network restrictions observed. Build verifiable via tsc --noEmit.
contribution_requirements: Commit directly to main branch. Do NOT push.
key_patterns: Feature flags UI uses FLAG_META (metadata map) + FLAG_CATEGORIES (grouping array) + custom card components for complex flags + generic ConfigFlagCard for simple config. Icons from lucide-react. Tailwind CSS with rounded-2xl cards, font-black headings, slate color palette. Admin components are client components with 'use client' directive.
directory_structure: apps/web/ contains the Next.js app. components/admin/ has admin panel client components. app/admin/ has route pages. prisma/ has schema and seeds.
